release: Moxa PoC Operational Design System v1.0

figma.fileName: Moxa PoC Operational Design System v1.0

knownBoundaries: Sitecore backend installation is not included.
Search, CRM submission, and production AI orchestration remain simulated or integration-ready only.
The native Figma URL is authoritative; the included Builder completed successfully and its component, pattern, and template galleries were visually reverified on 2026-07-20.
The Backup Starter plan uses one-mode collections; theme and viewport modes are split into separate collections.
Offline .fig export depends on Figma account permissions.
